scripts.db:reset: pnpm --filter pos-erp-backend exec prisma migrate reset --force
scripts.dev: pnpm --filter pos-erp-backend dev & pnpm --filter pos-erp-frontend dev
scripts.build: pnpm --filter pos-erp-backend build && pnpm --filter pos-erp-frontend build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter pos-erp-backend lint && pnpm --filter pos-erp-frontend lint
scripts.test: pnpm --filter pos-erp-backend test && pnpm --filter pos-erp-frontend test
scripts.ci:backend-with-db: pnpm --filter pos-erp-backend exec prisma migrate deploy && pnpm db:seed && pnpm --filter pos-erp-backend test
scripts.ci:backend-with-db-fallback: pnpm --filter pos-erp-backend exec prisma db push && pnpm db:seed && pnpm --filter pos-erp-backend test
